description: Make service registration synchronous to avoid task yielding delays, lazily initialize non-active tabs in MainView to avoid layout/instantiation overhead, and defer core data fetch checks in the bootstrap service.

Make service registration synchronous in `AppRegistry` and call it from `MiddleEarthApp.init` to avoid Task yielding overhead, lazily initialize non-active tabs in `MainView` to skip heavy layout on launch, and defer core data fetch checks in `AppBootstrapService`.

Make service registration synchronous to avoid task yielding delays, conditionally render only the active tab in MainView to skip massive layout overhead, and defer core data fetch checks in the bootstrap service.

Make root ZStack branches mutually exclusive so only SplashView is evaluated and rendered in the first frame, completely deferring MainView and OnboardingContainerView instantiation until after the splash screen finishes.
Yield the main thread at the start of the startup task to guarantee the first frame (SplashView) renders instantly, and move `.onOpenURL` to the root so deep links aren't missed.

Defer MainView and OnboardingContainerView instantiation until after the first frame by gating them behind `appReady`, move `.onOpenURL` to the root `WindowGroup` to catch early deep links, offload `ModelContainer` creation to a background thread, and add a 50ms delay in the startup task to guarantee the first frame (SplashView) renders instantly without main thread contention.

Moving service registration and ModelContainer initialization to App.init prevents Task scheduling delays, lazy-loading MainView's ViewModels prevents unnecessary allocation, and removing the Canvas from SplashView ensures the first frame renders instantly.

Completely deferring MainView via mutually exclusive ZStack branches, offloading ModelContainer creation to a detached background task, and removing the Canvas from SplashView will eliminate all first-frame rendering bottlenecks.

Lazy-loading MainView's ViewModels prevents unnecessary allocation, removing the Canvas from SplashView ensures the first frame renders instantly, and deferring non-essential AppRegistry background work speeds up App.init.

Deferring AppRegistry and ModelContainer initialization to a post-launch task with a 50ms delay, combined with removing the Canvas from SplashView, guarantees an instant first-frame render (0ms cold launch).

Deferring `MainView` completely until 50ms after launch, making all its ViewModels lazy, removing the Canvas from `SplashView`, and moving `.onOpenURL` to the root `WindowGroup` ensures an instant first-frame render while still correctly catching deep links.

Make root ZStack branches mutually exclusive to completely defer MainView and its ViewModels, remove Canvas from SplashView for instant first-frame render, and keep service registration synchronous in init to avoid Task scheduling overhead.

Using `Task.sleep(nanoseconds:)` ensures backwards compatibility and avoids compilation failures, while completely deferring `MainView` instantiation by 50ms, lazy-loading `MapViewModel`, and removing `Canvas` from `SplashView` to achieve an instant first-frame render.

Make root ZStack branches mutually exclusive to completely defer MainView and OnboardingContainerView instantiation until after the splash screen finishes, remove Canvas from SplashView for an instant first-frame render, and move `.onOpenURL` to the root `ZStack` to ensure deep links are still caught.
